title: Friends Client Mods
description: A mod pack with a focus on optimizing and enhancing visuals and simple voice chat.
body:
# Friends Client Mods

### A mod pack with a focus on optimizing and enhancing visuals and simple voice chat to have fun with your friends.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### This is a mod pack made for personal use with some friends of mine so it will be low quality uploading it here in case someone wants to use it and ease of excess for my friends.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### Optimising

- Sodium
- Lithium
- Iris

### Simple Voice Cha

Simple Voice Chat so you can talk to friends in the game, remember the server also needs the mod.

### I have a server-side version of the modpack made to work with this pack.

[Find it here.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/friends-mods-for-server)

Also, I am not responsible for making any of these mods so please visit the original author's mod pages.

The full mod list not coming soon!

---
